_comment: RK-16C FULL-CORPUS INTEGRITY LOCK v2 (TEMPLATE, SHAPE-ONLY). D-103 A1 two-manifest trust anchor. The real lock is POPULATED by the founder-gated METADATA-ONLY TWO-MANIFEST PREFLIGHT (HEAD/GET of the root seal + the deterministic per-file manifest sibling; payload pins read from the per-file manifest files[] entry) and founder-reviewed. The root seal does NOT cryptographically reference manifest.json — this is an AUDITABLE COMPATIBILITY chain, NOT a direct cryptographic root linkage (root_directly_references_file_manifest=false). NEVER fabricated, NEVER self-proved, NO credentials. The full-corpus --execute run loads + require()s a COMPLETE + founder-AUTHORIZED lock BEFORE any payload GET; any null/empty integrity field or authorized_for_payload_read!=true FAILS BEFORE NETWORK.
file_manifest_admissibility_anchor: deterministic sibling key + immutable create-only producer contract + inventory reconciliation
candidate_lock_schema_note: duplicate of schema id retained for clarity
